events.appearance_notes: Low activity; In a toy store, a man in black looked at the toys on the right shelf, and several tourists passed by outside the door.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 34.2s, in a toy store, a man in black looked at the toys on the right shelf, and several tourists passed by outside the door.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in black talked with the staff at the counter. The staff handed the piece of paper to the man in black, and the man in black handed the items in his pocket to the clerk.
events.event_text: From 34.2s to 95.0s, the man in black talked with the staff at the counter. The staff handed the piece of paper to the man in black, and the man in black handed the items in his pocket to the clerk.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the staff handed the items to the man in black. The man put the items into a handbag and left the toy store. During this period, several tourists passed by the door.
